name: Reemployment Assistance After Machine Injuries

mainEntity.name: Can I get reemployment help if machine injury prevents return to old job in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: Can I get reemployment help if machine injury prevents return to old job in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah offers reemployment assistance if unable to return due to industrial injury; contact insurer or Industrial Accidents Division.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Program covers retraining/vocational rehab for new careers post-amputation or TBI. Eligibility requires physician certification. Insurers resist—appeal denials. Relevant for Bountiful or Farmington workers transitioning jobs.[4][2]

description: Yes, Utah offers reemployment assistance if unable to return due to industrial injury; contact insurer or Industrial Accidents Division.[4]
